hero.title: FlashNote
hero.description: Create simple study cards, flip between front and back content, and practice active recall directly in your browser.

flow.title: Create → Review → Recall
steps: Create front and back study cards
Review one local card at a time
Flip and classify recall for this session

differences.title: Turn focused prompts into active recall
differences.description: FlashNote keeps local card creation, front/back review, and current-session recall tracking together.

items.title: Create
items.description: Build simple cards with required front and back text.

items.title: Review
items.description: Move through locally saved cards one at a time.

items.title: Recall
items.description: Flip answers and classify recall for the current session.

feel.title: A direct path from study prompt to recall
feel.description: The workspace keeps card management, review navigation, and session progress visible.

items.title: Build a local card set
items.description: Add, edit, or remove focused study prompts.

items.title: Review actively
items.description: Read the front and flip when ready for the answer.

items.title: Track this session
items.description: Mark cards as Remembered or Needs review without storing session history.

audiences.title: Who uses FlashNote
audiences.description: Useful for anyone studying through active recall.

items.title: Students
items.description: Build quick cards for lessons and revision.

items.title: Exam candidates
items.description: Review facts and concepts through front/back prompts.

items.title: Self learners
items.description: Maintain local study cards without an account.

resourceSection.title: Recall essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to create, review, and move local study cards.

items.title: Local card CRUD
items.description: Create, edit, delete, clear, and restore study cards.

items.title: Flip review
items.description: Navigate cards and reveal answers one at a time.

items.title: JSON portability
items.description: Import and export validated card arrays in the browser.

groupedSection.title: Create and recall local study cards
groupedSection.description: Keep multiple-record persistence and active review connected.

items.name: Front and back
items.description: Store one prompt and answer on each card.

items.name: Browser persistence
items.description: Reopen the locally saved card array after refresh.

items.name: Flip and navigate
items.description: Move through the cards and reveal each answer.

items.name: Session classification
items.description: Track Remembered and Needs review counts for this visit.

technicalSection.title: Designed for multiple-record browser persistence
technicalSection.description: FlashNote follows the shared Ansiversa client-side utility architecture.
items: Browser localStorage card persistence with no cloud sync.

finalCta.title: Practice active recall
finalCta.description: Open FlashNote to create, review, and revisit study cards anytime.
